action.reasoning: Observation: v23 test shows progress (max streak=35 safe steps, detector up to 56/ep, some collisions=1, but avg_safe=15.2, max_safe=35<<500, success=0, avg_dist~5-6m). Policy reaches human (detector triggers) but loses lock quickly vs random oracle movement. Config exact: 500 accum steps in [1,2)m with |angle|<0.2618rad. Earlier v4-v5 hit ~50-100 safe; literature heuristic ~0.5 follow-rate possible. Analysis: follow gains/speed-match (0.25+0.08*err) cause oscillation/drift; OA interferes near human; pure-rotate at 0.4rad too loose; depth valid/center bias good but seek not persistent. Root cause: stabilization not robust for long accumulation on dynamic target (human ~0.25m/s). Truncation in predict.py/test caused prior crashes. Decision: rewrite COMPLETE non-truncated test_full_episode.py+predict.py+train.py with clean v24 HeuristicPolicy (tuned: follow on detector>0.03|dist<4.0, base_linear=0.23 (human speed match)+0.12*err clipped[0.12,0.38], pure-rotate tighter at >0.28rad (~16deg), stronger ang_k=-8.0, OA only if detector<0.2+min_front<0.9 (improved center 20% for front, left/right 30%), backup<0.8, seek linear=0.85 when far+low detector, refined depth valid>0.02+center bias, per-step safe+streak+max_streak+detector+collisions tracking inside loop with exact config angle+compass, robust metrics/dict handling for collisions/social_nav_stats, one Env context with resets, full JSON contract+make_serializable+per_episode with all keys+manual safe>=500 for nav_seek_success+metrics fallback). Run test_full_episode.py (5 eps) for validation (expect >50 avg safe, longer streaks>100 in good epis). Update dummy ckpt to v24. This targets first positive success in eval before budget end.
